description: Legal record (#61) in a court register/pinqas from a Karaite beit din in Cairo (on f. 21r of Yevr.-Arab. I 328). Dated 24 Adar II 5323 AM (1563 CE). Farjallah b. ʿAbd al-Bāqī al-Levi and his brother Reʾuben al-Levi testify that they gave permission to their maternal uncle, Avraham b. David al-Levi Shaykh al-Yahūd, to render payment to their mother Estīta bt. David al-Levi that is related to a ten-year loan. The legal arrangments also mention a Rabbanite man by the name of Avraham al-Ḥakīm al-Iskrānī(?) (=al-Iskandarānī?), the latter part of his nomenclature may be a misspelling. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
